title: The 7 capabilities school never taught you to build something of your own
subtitle: What I learned going from manual jobs to self-taught programmer and business builder from Georgia.
benefitsIntro: Seven capabilities I've developed the hard way while building something of my own. Each one includes an exercise and a clear outcome.

benefits.label: Capacity 3
benefits.title: Build skills nobody can take from you

benefits.label: Capacity 6
benefits.title: Design a life before a business

author.name: Alberto
author.bio: I build businesses from Georgia. I write every week about what I learn along the way — without permission, without the perfect moment, and without a map.

cta.headline: Get your free copy.
cta.disclaimer: It will land straight in your inbox. You'll also start receiving my weekly writing. You can unsubscribe anytime.

seo.title: Free guide: 7 capabilities school never taught you
seo.description: A field manual on the capabilities that compound when you build something of your own — with real stories from Georgia, data-driven validation, and concrete exercises.
